new_translation: Ban quản lý đã quyết định thay đổi cách bố trí văn phòng.

old_example: We had a six-hour layover in Tokyo, so we decided to leave the airport and explore a few nearby temples before our connecting flight.
new_example: We had a six-hour layover in Tokyo before our flight today.
new_translation: Chúng tôi đã có sáu giờ nghỉ tại Tokyo trước chuyến bay.

old_example: The clouds drifted lazily across the bright blue sky, making it the perfect afternoon for a picnic in the park.
new_example: The clouds drifted lazily across the bright blue sky today.
new_translation: Những đám mây trôi lững lờ trên bầu trời xanh rực rỡ hôm nay.

old_example: The marketing director will lead the new initiative to expand our digital presence in the Asian market.
new_example: The marketing director will lead the new initiative today.
new_translation: Giám đốc tiếp thị sẽ dẫn dắt sáng kiến mới hôm nay.

old_example: The company is looking for a strong leader who can motivate the sales team to achieve their ambitious annual targets.
new_example: The company is looking for a strong leader today.
new_translation: Công ty đang tìm kiếm một nhà lãnh đạo mạnh mẽ hôm nay.

old_example: Global business leaders gathered in Singapore to discuss the future of artificial intelligence in the workplace.
new_example: Global business leaders gathered in Singapore today.
new_translation: Các nhà lãnh đạo doanh nghiệp toàn cầu đã tập trung tại Singapore.

old_example: Under the CEO's visionary leadership, the firm has transformed into a major player in the global renewable energy market.
new_example: Under the CEO's leadership, the firm has transformed today.
new_translation: Dưới sự lãnh đạo của CEO, công ty đã chuyển mình hôm nay.

old_example: Our company is one of the leading providers of cloud computing solutions for small and medium enterprises.
new_example: Our company is a leading provider of cloud computing solutions today.
new_translation: Công ty chúng tôi là nhà cung cấp hàng đầu về điện toán đám mây.

old_example: The sales team is currently following up on several promising leads from the recent international trade fair.
new_example: The sales team is currently following up on several leads today.
new_translation: Đội ngũ bán hàng hiện đang theo sát vài khách tiềm năng hôm nay.

old_example: The health department published a brief leaflet providing information on how to identify and prevent common seasonal illnesses.
new_example: The health department published a brief leaflet today.
new_translation: Bộ y tế đã xuất bản một tờ rơi ngắn hôm nay.

old_example: The corporate headquarters is located in a quiet, leafy suburb just outside the bustling city center.
new_example: The corporate headquarters is located in a quiet, leafy suburb today.
new_translation: Trụ sở chính của công ty nằm ở một vùng ngoại ô xanh tươi.

old_example: The company's innovative new technology is in a league of its own, far ahead of all its competitors.
new_example: The company's new technology is in a league of its own today.
new_translation: Công nghệ mới của công ty ở một đẳng cấp riêng hôm nay.

old_example: Professional sports leagues generate billions of dollars in revenue through broadcasting rights and sponsorships.
new_example: Professional sports leagues generate billions of dollars in revenue today.
new_translation: Các giải đấu thể thao chuyên nghiệp tạo ra hàng tỷ đô la hôm nay.

old_example: We need to fix the leak in the roof before the rainy season starts.
new_example: We need to fix the leak in the roof today.
new_translation: Chúng ta cần sửa lỗ hổng trên mái nhà hôm nay.

old_example: The maintenance team was called immediately to fix a leaking pipe in the staff restroom.
new_example: The maintenance team was called to fix a leaking pipe today.
new_translation: Đội bảo trì đã được gọi để sửa một đường ống rò rỉ hôm nay.

old_example: The hotel guests complained about a leaky faucet in the bathroom that kept them awake all night.
new_example: The hotel guests complained about a leaky faucet today.
new_translation: Các khách hàng đã phàn nàn về một vòi nước bị rò rỉ hôm nay.

old_example: To improve efficiency, the company has adopted lean manufacturing principles to reduce waste and optimize production.
new_example: The company has adopted lean manufacturing principles today.
new_translation: Công ty đã áp dụng các nguyên tắc sản xuất tinh gọn hôm nay.

old_example: He leaned against the wall while waiting for the elevator to arrive at the lobby.
new_example: He leaned against the wall while waiting today.
new_translation: Anh ấy đã dựa vào tường trong khi chờ đợi hôm nay.

old_example: In the picture, the woman is leaning over the desk to review the architectural blueprints.
new_example: In the picture, the woman is leaning over the desk today.
new_translation: Trong bức ảnh, người phụ nữ đang cúi trên bàn hôm nay.

old_example: Employees are encouraged to attend workshops to learn new skills and stay updated with industry trends.
new_example: Employees are encouraged to attend workshops to learn new skills today.
new_translation: Nhân viên được khuyến khích dự hội thảo để học kỹ năng mới.

old_example: The language school offers a variety of courses designed specifically for adult learners at all levels of proficiency.
new_example: The language school offers a variety of courses for adult learners today.
new_translation: Trường ngôn ngữ cung cấp nhiều khóa học cho học viên hôm nay.

old_example: Distance learning has become increasingly popular due to its flexibility and accessibility for working professionals.
new_example: Distance learning has become increasingly popular today.
new_translation: Học từ xa đã trở nên ngày càng phổ biến hôm nay.

old_example: The company signed a five-year lease for the new office space in the central business district.
new_example: The company signed a five-year lease for the new office today.
new_translation: Công ty đã ký hợp đồng thuê 5 năm cho văn phòng mới hôm nay.

old_example: As a leaseholder, he is responsible for the internal maintenance of the apartment, while the freeholder manages the building's exterior.
new_example: As a leaseholder, he is responsible for the maintenance of the apartment today.
new_translation: Với tư cách là người thuê, anh ấy chịu trách nhiệm bảo trì căn hộ.

old_example: Equipment leasing allows businesses to use the latest technology without a large initial capital investment.
new_example: Equipment leasing allows businesses to use the latest technology today.
new_translation: Việc thuê thiết bị cho phép các doanh nghiệp dùng công nghệ mới.

old_example: Cost is often the least important factor when choosing high-quality safety equipment for the factory.
new_example: Cost is often the least important factor when choosing equipment today.
new_translation: Chi phí thường là yếu tố ít quan trọng nhất khi chọn thiết bị.

old_example: Leaving the office lights on overnight is a waste of energy and against company policy.
new_example: Leaving the office lights on overnight is against company policy today.
new_translation: Việc để đèn văn phòng bật qua đêm là vi phạm chính sách.

old_example: The guest speaker will deliver a lecture on the impact of globalization on local manufacturing.
new_example: The guest speaker will deliver a lecture today.
new_translation: Diễn giả khách mời sẽ trình bày một bài giảng hôm nay.

old_example: The guest lecturer provided a fascinating insight into the latest developments in artificial intelligence.
new_example: The guest lecturer provided a fascinating insight today.
new_translation: Giảng viên khách mời đã cung cấp một cái nhìn sâu sắc hôm nay.

old_example: The university provides a series of online lectures for students who cannot attend classes in person.
new_example: The university provides a series of online lectures today.
new_translation: Trường đại học cung cấp một loạt các bài giảng trực tuyến hôm nay.

old_example: The successful marketing campaign led to a significant increase in the company's market share.
new_example: The successful marketing campaign led to an increase in market share today.
new_translation: Chiến dịch tiếp thị thành công đã dẫn đến tăng thị phần hôm nay.

old_example: Mr. Lee is the senior consultant responsible for the firm's expansion into the Vietnamese market.
new_example: Mr. Lee is the senior consultant today.
new_translation: Ông Lee là chuyên viên tư vấn cấp cao hôm nay.

old_example: The printing department is located at the end of the hallway, on the left side.

old_example: The committee decided to donate the leftover budget to a local charity at the end of the year.

old_example: The final leg of the business trip involves visiting the company's regional headquarters in Singapore.
new_example: The final leg of the trip involves visiting the headquarters today.
new_translation: Chặng cuối cùng của chuyến đi bao gồm việc thăm trụ sở hôm nay.

old_example: We are seeking legal advice to ensure that the new partnership agreement is fully compliant with international regulations.
new_example: We are seeking legal advice for the new agreement today.
new_translation: Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm lời khuyên pháp lý cho thỏa thuận hôm nay.

old_example: Steve Jobs is considered a legend in the technology industry for his role in co-founding Apple.
new_example: Steve Jobs is considered a legend in the technology industry today.
new_translation: Steve Jobs được coi là một huyền thoại công nghệ hôm nay.

old_example: The athlete's performance in the championship game was legendary, inspiring a new generation of players to pursue their dreams.
new_example: The athlete's performance was legendary, inspiring a new generation today.
new_translation: Màn trình diễn của vận động viên là huyền thoại hôm nay.

old_example: Please print your name and address legibly on the application form to avoid any processing delays.
new_example: Please print your name and address legibly on the form today.
new_translation: Vui lòng in tên và địa chỉ của bạn một cách rõ ràng hôm nay.

old_example: The national legislature debated the new tax proposal for several weeks before finally reaching a consensus and passing the bill.
new_example: The national legislature debated the new tax proposal for several weeks today.
new_translation: Cơ quan lập pháp đã tranh luận về đề xuất thuế mới hôm nay.

old_example: Opposition leaders questioned the legitimacy of the recent election results, citing widespread reports of voter intimidation and fraud.
new_example: Opposition leaders questioned the legitimacy of the election results today.
new_translation: Các nhà lãnh đạo đã đặt câu hỏi về tính hợp pháp hôm nay.

old_example: He decided to pay extra for an exit row seat because it offered more legroom, making the long-haul flight much more comfortable.
new_example: He decided to pay extra for a seat with more legroom today.
